# ArcAI

> ArcAI (Ask, Reflect, Create) is a free multimodal AI assistant by Win The Night Productions. Realtime voice conversations, image generation, code canvas, writing tools, music player and persistent memory in one app.

ArcAI is free forever for everyone. Unlimited chats with every model, unlimited realtime voice, Deep Search, web search, file uploads, document analysis, memory, canvases, shared chats, code generation and one-tap publishing are included with no paid tier.

Permanent accounts can generate or edit up to 20 image outputs per UTC day. Multi-image requests count once per returned output. Administrators have unlimited image generation and editing.

Published code creations use the `*.froydingermedia.online` domain and stay live until their owner unpublishes them.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Chat with Arc — voice, images, code and writing in one place.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Everything included free, with an optional support link.
- [Downloads](/downloads): Native apps for macOS, Windows (beta), iOS and Android.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Central hub for chats, canvases, images, deploys, music and memory.
- [Support](/support): Open a support ticket or get help.

## Optional

- [Settings](/dashboard/settings): Account, accent color, voice and usage settings.
- [Unsubscribe](/unsubscribe): Manage email preferences.
